author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Gears of War: E-Day | Collector's Edition
Pre-order the Gears of War: E-Day Collector's Edition to get early access to the Open Beta August 6 and unlock the Efxil Dom Character Skin and the Exfil Weapon Skin Set in-game at launch

PRE-ORDER NOW:
XBOX: https://shop.xboxgamestudios.com/products/gears-of-war-e-day-collectors-edition

Built for collectors. Rooted in brotherhood. Experience Emergence Day with the Gears of War: E Day Collector’s Edition — a premium collection created for our fans. 

At the center is a striking collectible statue of Marcus Fenix and Dominic Santiago, capturing the bond forged on the day the world fell. Paired with authentic physical collectibles including a replica of Carlos Santiago’s COG tags, a lithograph, in-game photo, and a custom SteelBook® case designed by illustrator Luke Preece, the Collector’s Edition honors the legacy, brotherhood, and sacrifice at the heart of Gears.

Housed in premium collector’s display packaging with a sliding drawer to display your tags, the Collector’s Edition also includes a thank-you note from the developers at The Coalition, celebrating our fans who have carried Gears across generations.

In addition to exclusive physical collectibles, the bundle includes the Gears of War: E-Day Premium Edition, featuring early access to the game at launch. 

Includes: 
• 15-inch collectible diorama statue of Marcus Fenix and Dominic Santiago (requires 3 AAA batteries, not included).
• 1:1 scale replica of Carlos Santiago’s COG tags made of metal zinc alloy and brass
• In-game photo 
• Lithograph
• Thank-You Note from The Coalition 
• Luke Preece designed Custom SteelBook® Case
• Collector’s Display Packaging
• Gears of War: E-Day base game (Xbox customers will receive a physical disc, Steam customers will receive a digital code)
• The Collector’s Edition also includes the Gears of War: E-Day Premium Edition digital upgrade which includes up to 5-Days Early Access, Bravo Squad Signature Weapon Pack, 1,000 Iron (premium in-game currency), and Five Seasonal Customization Packs, starting with the Emergence Pack at launch (the remaining packs will be available as released).

SUBSCRIBE TO XBOX: https://xbx.lv/2EEjmaR 

FOLLOW XBOX 
https://twitter.com/xbox 
https://www.facebook.com/xbox 
https://www.instagram.com/xbox/ 
https://www.tiktok.com/@xbox
https://www.threads.net/@xbox

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
[4K] XBOX Games Showcase 2026 | Gears of War: E-Day Direct
American Sign Language: https://youtube.com/live/macPbXej0a0
British Sign Language: https://youtube.com/live/tYGKZsFGQzA
Audio Descriptions: https://youtube.com/live/EPJcQA2eUbo

Join us for our double feature on June 7, 10am PT - XBOX Games Showcase immediately followed by Gears of War: E-Day Direct. It's our 25th anniversary and we're excited to share upcoming games from our first party studios as well as partners from around the globe. Stay tuned immediately following the Showcase for the Gears of War: E-Day Direct and join The Coalition for a deeper look into the upcoming origin story in the critically acclaimed series.

An XBOX Console Exclusive.   

Experience the horror and brutality of Emergence Day. Fourteen years before the original Gears of War, join Marcus Fenix and Dominic Santiago in a gripping origin-story campaign as the Locust Horde first erupts from below, igniting a desperate fight for survival.

Pre-order to get early access to the open beta August 6th and unlock the Exfil Dom Character Skin and the Exfil Weapon Skin Set in-game at launch.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Clockwork Revolution - The Heist | XBOX Games Showcase 2026
An XBOX Console Exclusive.

Change the past. Control the future.

When your gang’s heist goes sideways, you’re thrown back in time and discover your reality has been altered by the ruthless Lady Ironwood. In this first-person steampunk RPG, you’ll wield a powerful device to travel between past and present, rewriting the future of the city you call home—and changing the course of history however you see fit.

Wishlist now: https://www.xbox.com/games/clockwork-revolution

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Spyro™: A Realm Beyond | Cinematic Announce Trailer | XBOX Games Showcase 2026
Take flight on a brand-new adventure through a strange and wondrous realm. When Spyro™ finds himself stranded, his journey to discover a way home is interrupted by the arrival of a vicious invading force known as the Scavs. Spyro™ must make new allies and rise to protect this realm before it’s changed forever. Feel the freedom of flight as you soar above vibrant landscapes, weave between treetops, dive off massive landmarks and wing your way through this new realm in Spyro™ ’s boldest evolution yet. Carve your path through the skies and chain together dives, climbs and tight turns as you navigate the world your way. Crafted by Toys For Bob, this is a new evolution of Spyro™, built to send the purple dragon soaring higher than ever before.   

Spyro™: A Realm Beyond is coming to XBOX Series X|S and XBOX on PC as an XBOX Play Anywhere title and with XBOX Game Pass.

text:
Persona 6 — Teaser Trailer | XBOX Games Showcase 2026
An entirely new story is about to unfold.

The highly anticipated next chapter of the iconic RPG series delivers a bold, new standalone story blending heartfelt daily life and new characters with pulse-pounding, supernatural adventure. Whether it’s your first Persona game or you’ve been here since the beginning, this one’s for you.

Persona 6 is coming to XBOX Series X|S and XBOX on PC as an XBOX Play Anywhere title and with XBOX Game Pass.

https://www.xbox.com/games/persona

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Vivarium - Official Announce Trailer | XBOX Games Showcase 2026
Vivarium is a life-sim adventure that features hand-illustrated art inspired by timeless anime classics. Explore a “perfect” pocket world to reveal its secrets and progress through a non-linear narrative shaped by your choices.

Vivarium is available to wishlist today ahead of its launch on XBOX Series X|S and XBOX on PC. It will also be playable day one with XBOX Game Pass, with full support for XBOX Cloud and XBOX Play Anywhere.

author: Xbox YouTube
text:
Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse - Announcement Trailer | XBOX Games Showcase 2026
Crimson Curse — Will Your Fate Bloom in Despair or Salvation?

The latest installment in the series, Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse, is set to launch on October 15, 2026!

Set 23 years after Castlevania Dracula's Curse – A 2D Action-Exploration game that depicts the growth of a young Belmont, featuring enhanced freedom and speed. Experience the new “Castlevania” from KONAMI, Evil Empire and Motion Twin.

Pre-order today!

Castlevania: Belmont’s Curse is coming to XBOX Series X|S and XBOX on PC as an Xbox Play Anywhere title.

©Konami Digital Entertainment

text:
Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 | World Update 22 Announce | XBOX Games Showcase 2026
Microsoft Flight Simulator celebrates gorgeous United States of America landscapes in this spectacular World Update 22: US National Parks.  Featuring over thirty National Parks and Monuments and the Goodyear Blimp - Coming July 4th, 2026!

Want to experience the thrills and adventure of air racing? Coming this fall, take to the skies over New Mexico with the release of the world's fastest motorsport: the National Championship Air Races. The sky is calling! 

https://www.xbox.com/games/microsoft-flight-simulator-2024

Microsoft Flight Simulator 2024 | World Update 22 & National Championship Air Racing are coming to XBOX Series X|S and XBOX on PC as an XBOX Play Anywhere title and with XBOX Game Pass.
